title: Thai Shrimp and Feijoada Stir Fry
description: A fusion of Thai and Brazilian flavors in this quick and spicy stir fry. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove shrimp from the wok and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tbsp of oil to the wok and stir in the minced garlic and crushed peanuts.
Stir in the feijoada and cook for 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Return the shrimp to the wok and stir in the sirup.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the shrimp are well coated with the sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately over steamed rice or noodles.
